# Proddy

> AI-powered productivity suite that unifies messaging, tasks, calendars, canvases, and notes into one seamless work management platform.

## About
Proddy is an AI-powered productivity suite that unifies canvas, meetings, messaging, notes, and more into a single work management ecosystem. It combines real-time communication, task tracking, calendars, boards, canvases, and notes, with AI-powered features to streamline collaboration from discussion to execution. Available during a free public beta.

## Key Information
- Modules include Messaging, Tasks, Calendar, Boards, Canvas, Notes, Reports, and Dashboard.
- AI-powered features include Reply Suggestions, Daily Recap, Text to Diagram, and Notes Formatter.
- Free public beta with no credit card required and full platform access during the beta.

## Products/Services
- Messaging: Real-time team communication with rich text formatting, threads, searchable history, file sharing, and AI-powered features.
- All-in-one Work Management Suite: Unified platform with integrated modules (Messages, Tasks, Calendar, Boards, Canvas, Notes, Reports, Dashboard) to streamline workflows.

## Links
- [Get Started Free]( /auth/signup): Start building with Proddy today during our public beta — no credit card required.
- [Learn More]( /pricing): Free during public beta — full platform access.
